title: Fragments
description: Use React Fragments to return multiple top-level elements without a wrapping div.
problemStatement:
Avoid extra divs! Return an `

` and a `

` tag together without wrapping them in a `

` by using a React Fragment (`<>...`). **Requirement:** Use the shorthand empty tag syntax for the fragment.
hints: React components must return a single root element; fragments act as an invisible root.
expectedOutput: An h1 and p tag without a parent div in the final DOM
